message:
feat(fcp-sandbox): return graceful syscall set from build_syscall_allowlist and always allow CLONE

Change build_syscall_allowlist to return a (allowed, graceful) tuple,
enabling callers to distinguish hard-denied from gracefully-handled
syscalls. Always allow CLONE syscall (required for async runtimes).
Fix clippy lint on mutable binding. Add underscore separators to hex
literals for readability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
